Class RollbackDatabase

java.lang.Object
com.fastasyncworldedit.core.util.task.AsyncNotifyQueue
com.fastasyncworldedit.core.database.RollbackDatabase
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable
public class RollbackDatabase extends AsyncNotifyQueue

    • closeConnection

      public boolean closeConnection() throws SQLException
      Closes the connection with the database.
      Returns:
      true if successful
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the connection cannot be closed

      public boolean checkConnection()
      Checks if a connection is open with the database.
      Returns:
      true if the connection is open
